curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which changes a single line in _pygmentize_lines() in theme/templatetags/issues.py. The fallback path at line 77 returned raw input lines without escaping; the fix wraps them with escape(). The mark_safe() call in the pygmentize() filter then rendered these unsanitized lines as HTML. Sibling templatetag files (code.py, add_to_qs.py, etc.) were checked but none share the same vulnerability pattern. Vulnerability class xss confirmed from CWE-79 and the nature of the fix (adding HTML escaping to prevent script injection).
